definition.name: WFEmisionRamosTecnicos
definition.xml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<bpmn2:definitions xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:bpmn2="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL" xmlns:bpmndi="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/DI" xmlns:dc="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DC" xmlns:di="http://www.omg.org/spec/DD/20100524/DI" id="sample-diagram" targetNamespace="http://bpmn.io/schema/bpmn" xsi:schemaLocation="http://www.omg.org/spec/BPMN/20100524/MODEL BPMN20.xsd">
  <bpmn2:process id="Process_1" isExecutable="false">
    <bpmn2:startEvent id="StartEvent_1">
      <bpmn2:outgoing>SequenceFlow_0jatrta</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:startEvent>
    <bpmn2:task id="Task_0sivjff" name="Registro de la oferta" userActions="[]" entityState="DRAFT">
      <bpmn2:incoming>SequenceFlow_0jatrta</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>SequenceFlow_0d4fw2i</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:task>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0jatrta" sourceRef="StartEvent_1" targetRef="Task_0sivjff" />
    <bpmn2:task id="Task_1grunjo" name="Generar cotización" userActions="["QUOTE"]" entityState="INPROGRESS">
      <bpmn2:incoming>SequenceFlow_0d4fw2i</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>SequenceFlow_1d6ysoq</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:task>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0d4fw2i" sourceRef="Task_0sivjff" targetRef="Task_1grunjo" />
    <bpmn2:task id="Task_1y4wjna" name="Confirmar" userActions="["ISSUE"]" entityState="DRAFT">
      <bpmn2:incoming>SequenceFlow_1d6ysoq</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>SequenceFlow_1x1zpjh</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:task>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_1d6ysoq" sourceRef="Task_1grunjo" targetRef="Task_1y4wjna" />
    <bpmn2:endEvent id="EndEvent_1nq9wom">
      <bpmn2:incoming>SequenceFlow_0vy3e8k</bpmn2:incoming>
    </bpmn2:endEvent>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_1x1zpjh" sourceRef="Task_1y4wjna" targetRef="Task_1e6p51v" />
    <bpmn2:task id="Task_1e6p51v" name="Activo" userActions="["CHANGES","REINSTATEMENT"]" entityState="ACTIVE">
      <bpmn2:incoming>SequenceFlow_1x1zpjh</bpmn2:incoming>
      <bpmn2:outgoing>SequenceFlow_0vy3e8k</bpmn2:outgoing>
    </bpmn2:task>
    <bpmn2:sequenceFlow id="SequenceFlow_0vy3e8k" sourceRef="Task_1e6p51v" targetRef="EndEvent_1nq9wom" />
  </bpmn2:process>
  <bpmndi:BPMNDiagram id="BPMNDiagram_1">
    <bpmndi:BPMNPlane id="BPMNPlane_1" bpmnElement="Process_1">
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="_BPMNShape_StartEvent_2" bpmnElement="StartEvent_1">
        <dc:Bounds x="399" y="240" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_0sivjff_di" bpmnElement="Task_0sivjff">
        <dc:Bounds x="491" y="218" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="SequenceFlow_0jatrta_di" bpmnElement="SequenceFlow_0jatrta">
        <di:waypoint x="435" y="258" />
        <di:waypoint x="491" y="258" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_1grunjo_di" bpmnElement="Task_1grunjo">
        <dc:Bounds x="641" y="218" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="SequenceFlow_0d4fw2i_di" bpmnElement="SequenceFlow_0d4fw2i">
        <di:waypoint x="591" y="258" />
        <di:waypoint x="641" y="258" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_1y4wjna_di" bpmnElement="Task_1y4wjna">
        <dc:Bounds x="802" y="218" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="SequenceFlow_1d6ysoq_di" bpmnElement="SequenceFlow_1d6ysoq">
        <di:waypoint x="741" y="258" />
        <di:waypoint x="802" y="258" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="EndEvent_1nq9wom_di" bpmnElement="EndEvent_1nq9wom">
        <dc:Bounds x="1120" y="240" width="36" height="36" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="SequenceFlow_1x1zpjh_di" bpmnElement="SequenceFlow_1x1zpjh">
        <di:waypoint x="902" y="258" />
        <di:waypoint x="963" y="258" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
      <bpmndi:BPMNShape id="Task_1e6p51v_di" bpmnElement="Task_1e6p51v">
        <dc:Bounds x="963" y="218" width="100" height="80" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNShape>
      <bpmndi:BPMNEdge id="SequenceFlow_0vy3e8k_di" bpmnElement="SequenceFlow_0vy3e8k">
        <di:waypoint x="1063" y="258" />
        <di:waypoint x="1120" y="258" />
      </bpmndi:BPMNEdge>
    </bpmndi:BPMNPlane>
  </bpmndi:BPMNDiagram>
</bpmn2:definitions>
